title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates nine Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce token costs, and extend Claude with capabilities like web scraping, media generation, and model switching. The plugins reviewed include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic's Skill Creator, Legal, Frontend Design, Security Guidance, OpenAI Codex, BuildPartner, Morph, and Codeburn.
